title: Metcal to Launch New Digital Handheld Convection Tool for Soldering and Reworking Applications
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Metcal, part of OK International and Dover (NYSE: DOV), and a leader in benchtop soldering for electronics and industrial manufacturing, today announced the launch of its new HCT-910 Hot Air Rework System digital handheld convection tool.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) CEO Richard Tobin on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Dover Corporation. (NYSE:DOV ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 21, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Jack Dickens - Senior Director, Investor Relations Richard Tobin - President and CEO Brad Cerepak - Senior Vice President and CFO Conference Call Participants Andrew Obin - Bank of America Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Scott Davis - Melius Research Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Andrew Kaplowitz - Citi Group Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Deane Dray - RBC Capital Markets Brett Linzey - Mizuho Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Dover's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Dover Corporation (DOV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.88% and 0.71%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Dover Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV), a diversified global manufacturer, announced its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2022.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions Launches New Clean Fuel Dispensers to the European Market
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ – Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, today announced the launch of its new technologically-advanced dispenser for hydrogen and its first-ever four-nozzle Wayne Helix™ compressed natural gas ("CNG") fuel dispenser in the EMEA (Europe, the Middle East and Africa) region.

title: Markem-Imaje Launches SmartLase C600 CO2 Laser Printer
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Markem-Imaje, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global provider of end-to-end supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, recently announced the launch of the SmartLase® C600, the new 60-watt CO2 laser printer.

title: Hydro Systems Adds E-Dos Electronic Injector to Lineup of Solutions for the Farm
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hydro Systems, part of PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV), recently expanded its lineup of reliable pump solutions for the farm with the addition of the E-Dos electronic injector.

title: SWEP Launches Two New High-Efficiency Products
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- SWEP, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a world-leading supplier of brazed plate heat exchangers (BPHEs), today announced the launch of the B8DW double-wall compact heat exchanger and the FI22AS high-efficiency condenser and evaporator.

title: Dover Corporation (DOV) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Dover Corporation (DOV) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Destaco Introduces 82L-3E Series Power Clamps
text: New design features clamping-arm opening angles that are adjustable up to 105° DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Destaco, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the introduction of its new 82L-3E Series Power Clamps, which feature lightweight, enclosed aluminum housing and optimized mechanics that are more precise and significantly longer-lasting than previous power-clamp designs.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions Launches New Innovative Products and Solutions for the Retail Fueling Market
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, announced the launch of multiple fuel dispenser models, a new point-of-sale (POS) system and a next-generation automatic tank gauge (ATG) console.

title: Dover (DOV) Rides on Strong Demand & Buyouts Amid High Costs
text: Dover (DOV) is benefiting from strong demand across end markets, strategic acquisitions and cost-control actions despite supply chain challenges and escalating costs.

title: Dover (DOV) Closes Malema Buyout, Boosts Biopharma Portfolio
text: Dover (DOV) is working toward building its biopharma platform through new product developments and opportunistic acquisitions, with the Malema buyout being the latest.

title: Dover Corp: An Undervalued Dividend King
text: Investors looking for companies with very long dividend growth streaks might want to consider those names in the Dividend King index.

title: Dover Completes Acquisition of Malema Engineering Corporation
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , July 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) announced today that it has completed the previously announced acquisition of Malema Engineering Corporation ("Malema"), which will become part of the PSG business unit within Dover's Pumps & Process Solutions segment.

title: Dover Corporation: What To Make Of This Dividend King
text: Dover Corp. is one of the few dividend kings, hiking its dividend for 66 consecutive years. The problem is that the yield isn't very juicy given its low dividend growth rate.
